text_block_list.text:
I decide to head to the academy track that evening to speak to 
McQueen. Along the way…

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are! I've been meaning to speak with you!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: I have news about the grace period before Team Sirius's dissolution!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you'll be happy to hear this. You have until the end of this 
term, so the end of June.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Above all else, the academy recognizes that the students have races 
to focus on.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: They decided to allow you both ample time to train.

I'm relieved. That means we can forget about our recruitment issues 
for now!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, I'm only the messenger! But I'm glad too. Good luck at the 
Tenno Sho!

The track is empty at this time of night. Most horsegirls are already 
in bed now…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant, pant…
But that's not stopping McQueen. How many nights has it been now?

However, it's plain to see that the overwork has taken a toll on her 
form. Both her upper and lower balance are off.

I would hate to see all of this ineffective training lead to an injury just 
before the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant… Mmph, ah… Ahh!

At that very moment, McQueen wavers and falls to the ground amidst 
a cloud of dirt.
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Where am I… Oh. Trainer? Why are you—

We're in the infirmary. You should lie back down. Seems you have a 
fever.

We're in the infirmary. You should lie back down. Seems you have a 
fever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: A fever? Oh… I must have been more fatigued than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When I was younger, I often used to break out into fevers after 
running around in my childhood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So it would seem.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-Wait, did you know this whole time?! A-About my going out at 
night?
Yes, and I had planned to confront you about it tonight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I see… You always are sharp when it comes to these sorts of things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Go ahead and say it, then. No more private training, right?
choice_data_list: I can't have you overdoing it now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Considering what I've brought upon myself, I have no room to argue. 
You have my word.

Then you're officially banned from training at night… but in 
exchange, let me be here for you. Open up to me.

Then you're officially banned from training at night… but in 
exchange, let me be here for you. Open up to me.
Let me help you realize your dream of winning the Tenno Sho.
Let me help you realize your dream of winning the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How did you… Ah! Did you hear that from Ryan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So that's what Ryan's little secret was all about! Meddling as ever, that girl.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But are you sure? If you're serious about helping me, you need to be 
prepared to handle the responsibility of training a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Are you ready for that? To… well… to become one of heart and mind?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no hesitation at all. That part of you hasn't changed at all from 
your assistant trainer days.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Always putting us first…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Very well. Then I shall not hold anything back any longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll be as selfish as it takes to make my dreams of victory at the Tenno 
Sho come true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I am going to win!
Yeah, let's do this together!
Yeah, let's do this together!
